description: Blocked order — customer unaware of ERP hold

input.user_input: I placed order 1001 three days ago and nothing has happened. When will it ship?

description: Conflicting claim — customer says shipped but ERP says delayed

input.user_input: Your colleague told me order 1003 was shipped yesterday but I still have no tracking number.
I never asked you to cancel order 1006. I want an explanation and I want it reinstated immediately.
